artists.name: TK from Ling Tosite Sigure
artists.description: Solo project of Toru "TK" Kitajima, known for progressive and emotional rock songs including anime themes.

artists.name: Ed Sheeran
artists.description: English singer-songwriter blending pop, folk, and R&B, known for global hits and acoustic ballads.

artists.name: Luis Fonsi
artists.description: Puerto Rican singer and songwriter famous for Latin pop hits and international collaborations.

artists.name: BTS
artists.description: South Korean group mixing pop, hip-hop, and EDM, noted for conceptual albums and multilingual releases.

artists.name: Angèle
artists.description: Belgian pop artist singing primarily in French, known for witty, melodic tracks and modern production.

artists.name: Laura Pausini
artists.description: Italian pop singer with a wide international following, performing in Italian, Spanish, and other languages.

songs.title: unravel
songs.lyricsPlainText:
mimi o sumaseba yoru no kaze ga naite
kodoku na koe ga mune o sasu

hieta shinzou tokasou to shite
yubi de nazoru uso no koe

unravel this story you wrote for me
hikisakareta yume no naka de
boku wa mada kimi o sagashiteiru

lines: mimi o sumaseba yoru no kaze ga naite
kodoku na koe ga mune o sasu
hieta shinzou tokasou to shite
yubi de nazoru uso no koe
unravel this story you wrote for me
hikisakareta yume no naka de
boku wa mada kimi o sagashiteiru

songs.title: Shape of You
songs.lyricsPlainText:
The club lights fade as the night begins
We talk for hours over empty drinks

Your laughter dances in the crowded room
Every word you say pulls me closer to you

I'm in love with the way you move
With every heartbeat I lean into you
The third line of this chorus shows I'm falling
But I don't know what I'm supposed to do

lines: The club lights fade as the night begins
We talk for hours over empty drinks
Your laughter dances in the crowded room
Every word you say pulls me closer to you
I'm in love with the way you move
With every heartbeat I lean into you
The third line of this chorus shows I'm falling
But I don't know what I'm supposed to do

songs.title: Despacito
songs.lyricsPlainText:
Lento se enciende el sol sobre tu piel
Cada susurro me invita a caer

Quiero acercarme sin prisa, despacito
Leer tu mundo como un manuscrito

Canta despacito cerca de mí
Deja que el tiempo se quede aquí
Cada latido marca el destino
Mientras bailamos en este camino

lines: Lento se enciende el sol sobre tu piel
Cada susurro me invita a caer
Quiero acercarme sin prisa, despacito
Leer tu mundo como un manuscrito
Canta despacito cerca de mí
Deja que el tiempo se quede aquí
Cada latido marca el destino
Mientras bailamos en este camino

songs.title: ON
songs.lyricsPlainText:
또 다시 문을 열어 길 위에 서
작은 두려움도 함께 데려와

상처 난 날개라도 펼쳐보면
어둠 속에서도 날 수 있을까

Bring it on, 세상이 흔들려도
넘어져도 다시 일어나겠어
내 심장은 더 크게 외쳐
지금 이 순간을 살아

lines: 또 다시 문을 열어 길 위에 서
작은 두려움도 함께 데려와

Bring it on, 세상이 흔들려도
넘어져도 다시 일어나겠어
내 심장은 더 크게 외쳐
지금 이 순간을 살아

songs.title: Black Swan
songs.lyricsPlainText:
어두운 무대 위에 혼자 서서
마지막 박동을 귀 기울여

춤추던 그림자가 날 감싸면
사라질까 두려운 이 노래

날개 없는 검은 새가 되어
깊은 물 아래로 잠겨가도
내 안의 소리를 지켜낼게
끝나지 않을 이 무대를 위해

내 안의 소리를 지켜낼게
끝나지 않을 이 무대를 위해

songs.title: Filter
songs.lyricsPlainText:
너의 눈에 비친 수많은 색
그 중 하나가 되고 싶어 난

조금 더 선명하게 다가가서
네가 원하는 날로 변해갈게

왼쪽에는 원래의 나를 두고
오른쪽엔 너를 위한 나를 두고
이 둘 사이에서 웃고 있는
진짜 내가 누군지 찾고 있어

lines: 너의 눈에 비친 수많은 색

이 둘 사이에서 웃고 있는
진짜 내가 누군지 찾고 있어

songs.title: Balance ton quoi
songs.lyricsPlainText:
Ils disent que c'est juste pour rire
Mais les mots restent dans la tête

Je réponds avec un sourire
Je réécris toutes leurs défaites

Balance ton quoi, dis-le plus fort
On n'est pas là pour faire semblant
On change les règles, on change le décor
On prend la scène pour un instant

lines: Ils disent que c'est juste pour rire
Mais les mots restent dans la tête
Je réponds avec un sourire
Je réécris toutes leurs défaites
Balance ton quoi, dis-le plus fort
On n'est pas là pour faire semblant
On change les règles, on change le décor
On prend la scène pour un instant

songs.title: Tout oublier
songs.lyricsPlainText:
On a promis de rester sages
Mais la nuit nous fait mentir

On laisse nos doutes dans les bagages
On suit la route sans réfléchir

On veut tout oublier ce soir
Les rendez-vous, les faux espoirs
On danse jusqu'au petit matin
Pour retrouver un peu de chemin

lines: On a promis de rester sages
Mais la nuit nous fait mentir
On laisse nos doutes dans les bagages
On suit la route sans réfléchir
On veut tout oublier ce soir
Les rendez-vous, les faux espoirs
On danse jusqu'au petit matin
Pour retrouver un peu de chemin

songs.title: Flou
songs.lyricsPlainText:
Les photos défilent dans ma tête
Comme un film qu'on regarde trop vite

Je me perds dans toutes ces requêtes
Dans un futur encore en fuite

Tout est flou quand je pense à demain
Mais je marche quand même sur ce chemin
Je garde le rythme, je garde la foi
Même si le monde ne m'attend pas

lines: Les photos défilent dans ma tête
Comme un film qu'on regarde trop vite
Je me perds dans toutes ces requêtes
Dans un futur encore en fuite
Tout est flou quand je pense à demain
Mais je marche quand même sur ce chemin
Je garde le rythme, je garde la foi
Même si le monde ne m'attend pas

songs.title: Perdus
songs.lyricsPlainText:
On se croit toujours un peu en retard
Sur des rêves qu'on n'a pas choisis

On se raconte des histoires le soir
Pour ne pas avouer qu'on s'ennuie

Perdus dans la ville qui s'allume
On cherche un signe dans la brume
On fait semblant d'avoir tout prévu
Mais on avance un peu à vue

lines: On se croit toujours un peu en retard
Sur des rêves qu'on n'a pas choisis
On se raconte des histoires le soir
Pour ne pas avouer qu'on s'ennuie
Perdus dans la ville qui s'allume
On cherche un signe dans la brume
On fait semblant d'avoir tout prévu
Mais on avance un peu à vue

songs.title: Non è detto
songs.lyricsPlainText:
Non è detto che resti per sempre
Questa luce che vedo negli occhi

Camminiamo sul filo del niente
Tra promesse e piccoli sbagli

Non è detto che saremo uguali
Ma io tengo la mano sul tuo domani
Ogni parola cade piano
Come pioggia sulla tua mano

lines: Non è detto che resti per sempre
Questa luce che vedo negli occhi
Camminiamo sul filo del niente
Tra promesse e piccoli sbagli
Non è detto che saremo uguali
Ma io tengo la mano sul tuo domani
Ogni parola cade piano
Come pioggia sulla tua mano

songs.title: City Lights (2018 Mix)
songs.lyricsPlainText:
Neon signs above the empty street
Summer rain is falling at my feet

I left my doubts on the passenger side
Chasing echoes of another life

In these city lights I feel alive
Every heartbeat keeping time
No more shadows, no more fear
Only you and I are here

lines: Neon signs above the empty street
Summer rain is falling at my feet
I left my doubts on the passenger side
Chasing echoes of another life
In these city lights I feel alive
Every heartbeat keeping time
No more shadows, no more fear
Only you and I are here

songs.title: Midnight Calls
songs.lyricsPlainText:
The phone lights up at 2 AM
You say my name like it's a sin

We cross the lines that we drew before
Leave all our reason at the door

These midnight calls are pulling me in
I know it's wrong but I still give in
Tomorrow we'll pretend we forgot
But tonight we both know we did not

lines: The phone lights up at 2 AM
You say my name like it's a sin
We cross the lines that we drew before
Leave all our reason at the door
These midnight calls are pulling me in
I know it's wrong but I still give in
Tomorrow we'll pretend we forgot
But tonight we both know we did not

songs.title: Broken Heart Anthem
songs.lyricsPlainText:
I play this worn-out second-hand guitar
Trying to fix my broken heart with every bar

The neighbors bang along the paper wall
But I keep singing so I don't fall

This is my broken heart anthem tonight
Three chords and a shout to make it right
If I scream it loud enough in the dark
Maybe you'll hear my broken heart

lines: I play this worn-out second-hand guitar
Trying to fix my broken heart with every bar
The neighbors bang along the paper wall
But I keep singing so I don't fall
This is my broken heart anthem tonight
Three chords and a shout to make it right
If I scream it loud enough in the dark
Maybe you'll hear my broken heart

songs.title: Broken Heart Serenade
songs.lyricsPlainText:
Static on the radio, rain on the glass
Your shadow on the doorway fading fast

I wrote your name in chords that fall apart
Every note another broken heart

So let this broken heart serenade
Echo through the mess we made
If silence is the price we pay
I'll sing alone until it fades away

lines: Static on the radio, rain on the glass
Your shadow on the doorway fading fast
I wrote your name in chords that fall apart
Every note another broken heart
So let this broken heart serenade
Echo through the mess we made
If silence is the price we pay
I'll sing alone until it fades away

songs.title: Pieces of a Broken Heart
songs.lyricsPlainText:
We turned our promises into scars
Left our song in all these bars

On the floor there are pieces of a broken heart
Little shards of what we used to call art

Pick them up, hold them to the light
See them burning in the night
If love was more than just a work of art
Why am I holding a broken heart?

lines: We turned our promises into scars

On the floor there are pieces of a broken heart
Little shards of what we used to call art
Pick them up, hold them to the light
See them burning in the night
If love was more than just a work of art
Why am I holding a broken heart?

translations.text:
If I listen closely, the night wind starts to cry
A lonely voice cuts straight into my chest

Trying to melt this heart that's frozen stiff
I trace the lies in your voice with my fingertips

Unravel this story you once wrote for me
In torn-apart dreams where nothing is free
Inside that nightmare, ripped at the seams
I'm still searching for you within the ruins of my dreams

When I strain my ears, the night wind softly weeps
A lonely voice stabs deep into my heart

I try to thaw this cold, unmoving heart
By tracing with my fingers the sound of your deceit

Unravel this tale you crafted for me
Inside the shredded fragments of my dreams
Even in this world that's falling apart
I'm still searching for you, led by my broken heart

Listen close and hear the night wind cry
A lonely sound that pierces through my chest

To try and melt this heart turned into ice
I trace your lying voice with shaking hands

Unravel this story written long ago
Among the tattered fragments of my sleep
I am still reaching out through all this pain
Calling your name from somewhere deep

Slowly the sun lights up your skin
Every whisper tempts me to give in

I want to come closer, slowly, no haste
Read your whole world like a script I taste

Sing softly, slowly, right next to me
Let time itself stay here and be
Every heartbeat writes the fate we claim
While we keep dancing on this endless lane

Slowly the sunlight rises on your skin
Each little whisper makes my head spin

I want to approach you calmly, nice and slow
Read your whole world like a book I know

Sing to me slowly, close to my side
Let time stop here, let it forget to fly
Each beating heart is drawing our design
As we keep dancing on this crooked line

Every murmur calls me to your space

Read every chapter written in your touch

Let all of time stay where we can see

While we keep dancing, swaying to and fro

Lentement, le soleil se pose sur ta peau
Chaque murmure me fait perdre les mots

Once again I open up the door and stand on the road
Even my small fears are dragged along with me

Even if my days are full of scars, when I look back
Maybe I can still fly from deep inside the storm

Bring it on, even if the world starts to shake
Even if I fall, I will rise again and wake
My heart only grows larger when it's strained
I'll live this very second, unrestrained

Alone I stand beneath a heavy stage
The last applause still ringing in my ears

If the dancing silhouette ever embraces me
Would this song disappear, feeding all my fears?

I become a black bird with no dawn in sight
Even if I'm trapped beneath the deepest tide
I will guard the voice that echoes in my chest
To keep this endless stage from falling into rest

So many colors are reflected in your eyes
I just want to be the single shade you find

I'll come a little closer, clearer than before
I'll turn into the version that you're looking for

On my left side stands the me you've always known
On my right, a different me that's just for you alone
Smiling in the space between these two apart
I'm still searching for who I am inside my heart

They say it's all just in good fun
But the words stay stuck inside my mind

I answer everything with a smile
I rewrite all their losses in my lines

Call them out now, say it out loud
We're not here pretending for the crowd
We change the rules, we change the scene
We take the stage and show what we mean

It's not said that this light will always stay
The one I see shining in your eyes today

We walk a tightrope over empty space
Between small mistakes and promises we made

It's not said that we will stay the same
But I still hold my hand over your tomorrow's flame
Every word we speak is falling slow
Like gentle rain on the hand I know
